name: Baked Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine sugar, flour, and cocoa powder in a bowl.
3. Stir in beaten eggs, melted butter, vanilla extract, and chopped nuts.
4. Place a large pan of hot water in the oven.
5. Pour the batter into a buttered square cake pan.
6. Place the pan in the larger pan with water so that it comes halfway up the side.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
8. Remove from the larger pan to cool.
9. The pudding will have a custard-like consistency when cooled.
10. Serve lukewarm or cut into squares. Good for chocolate lovers, a cross between a pudding & a brownie.
Source: Lucy Waverman CookingS CookBk
